title: Bridges & Tunnels
summary: Famous bridge icons, major New York area crossings, record-setting viaducts, and long tunnels become length, history, and engineering challenges.

audience.readingLevel: short landmark facts with rounded distance comparisons

sources.label: Wikipedia list of bridges
sources.note: General bridge index for landmark cross-checking.

sources.label: Wikipedia list of longest bridges
sources.note: Length context for record-setting viaducts and sea crossings.

sources.label: Wikipedia list of longest tunnels
sources.note: Tunnel length context for rail, road, mountain, and undersea tunnels.

cards.name: Brooklyn Bridge
cards.fact: A New York icon, the Brooklyn Bridge joined Manhattan and Brooklyn with Gothic stone towers and a daring suspended span.
